## Test plan

- [ ] Documentation or metadata only
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo check`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] Real Go-module smoke test for the changed command
- [ ] Staticcheck smoke test for `clippy` changes

- Platform-specific behavior:
- Follow-up documentation or issue:
